headline: Is It Time To Reassess Amcor (AMCR) After The Berry Global Acquisition Deal
summary: If you are wondering whether Amcor's share price really reflects what the business is worth today, a good starting point is to look calmly at the recent performance and what the current market price might be implying. Over the short term, the stock has returned 3.1% over 7 days and 1.5% over 30 days. Year to date the return sits at a 2.1% decline and the 1 year return is a 6.5% decline, with a 3 year return of a 13.1% decline and a 5 year return of a 12.6% decline. Recent coverage around...

headline: Why The Story Around Amcor (AMCR) Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: Amcor’s blended fair value estimate has slipped to $51.66 from $52.54, putting a slightly lower anchor on the price target investors are watching. That shift lines up with a mixed set of analyst calls, where fresh initiations, target moves, and downgrades are all pulling the consensus in different directions. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative may shape the way you track Amcor’s potential from here. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Amcor shifts by adding it to your...
